_comment_nist_fields: Fields below follow IR 8278Ar1 Section 3.2 OLIR template
reference_document_element_description: Knowledge of causal inference methods, including difference-in-differences, instrumental variables, regression discontinuity, propensity score matching, and their identification assumptions.
comments: DCWF task intersects with WIDAI AB domain. AB-K-009 is the strongest semantic match. Secondary: RC-T-011 (RC, cosine: 0.301), AG-S-005 (AG, cosine: 0.288).
_comment_widai_extensions: Fields below are WIDAI extensions per ADR-014

primary_method.name: Cross-Encoder STS
primary_method.description: Semantic Textual Similarity via cross-encoder regression trained on STS-Benchmark.
primary_method.significance: STS 2.3/10 (raw 0.234). No substantive shared vocabulary — relationship is purely semantic. DCWF-only terms [coordinate, functions, incident, response] vs WIDAI-only terms [assumptions, causal, difference, differences, discontinuity, identification] define the semantic distance between the descriptions.

bertscore.significance: BERTScore F1=0.852 (P=0.884, R=0.823). P exceeds R by 0.061 — the DCWF element's 4 words are well-captured by the WIDAI KSA's 18 words, but the KSA contains additional specificity not reflected in the DCWF element.

nli_cross_encoder.significance: NLI: entailment-dominant (84.9%). The model interprets "Coordinate incident response functions." as logically implying aspects of "Knowledge of causal inference methods, including difference-in-differences, inst" — directional semantic containment consistent with 'Intersects with' classification.

biencoder_cosine.description: Bi-encoder sentence embeddings with cosine similarity.
biencoder_cosine.significance: Bi-encoder 0.307 > STS 0.234 (gap +0.073). Independent encoding finds more similarity than cross-attention. Shared surface terms [none] inflate the bi-encoder, but cross-attention detects semantic divergence beneath the vocabulary overlap.

jaccard_token.description: Token-level Jaccard similarity (intersection/union of lowercased word tokens).
jaccard_token.significance: Jaccard 0.0%. Zero substantive shared tokens. The entire relationship is semantic — no lexical trace. DCWF terms: [coordinate, functions, incident, response]. WIDAI terms: [assumptions, causal, difference, differences, discontinuity, identification].
